vendor.name: Peptide Sciences
vendor.disclaimer: For research use only. Not for human consumption. Consult a physician before use.

products.name: BPC-157 5mg
products.description: BPC-157 (Body Protective Compound-157) is a synthetic pentadecapeptide consisting of 15 amino acids. Extensively studied for its remarkable tissue-healing and cytoprotective properties, BPC-157 has shown significant promise in preclinical research for accelerating recovery from muscle, tendon, ligament, and gut injuries. Research suggests it promotes angiogenesis, upregulates growth hormone receptors, and activates the nitric oxide system.
products.short_description: Premier tissue repair peptide — accelerates healing of muscles, tendons, ligaments, and gut.

products.name: TB-500 5mg
products.description: TB-500 is a synthetic version of the naturally occurring peptide Thymosin Beta-4. It plays a critical role in building new blood vessels, muscle tissue fibers, cell migration, and promoting cell survival and differentiation. TB-500 is highly studied for systemic healing properties, making it a popular research compound for accelerating recovery from injuries and reducing inflammation throughout the body.
products.short_description: Systemic healing peptide — promotes tissue regeneration and reduces inflammation body-wide.

products.name: Ipamorelin 5mg
products.description: Ipamorelin is a selective growth hormone secretagogue and ghrelin receptor agonist. It stimulates the pituitary gland to release growth hormone in a highly selective manner, without significantly affecting cortisol, prolactin, or other hormones. Research indicates potential benefits for lean muscle preservation, fat metabolism, sleep quality, and recovery — all with a clean stimulation profile.
products.short_description: Clean GH secretagogue — selectively stimulates growth hormone release without unwanted hormone spikes.

products.name: CJC-1295 Without DAC 5mg
products.description: CJC-1295 Without DAC (also known as Modified GRF 1-29) is a growth hormone-releasing hormone (GHRH) analogue. Without the Drug Affinity Complex (DAC), it has a shorter half-life that mimics natural pulsatile GH release patterns. Typically combined with Ipamorelin for synergistic GH stimulation. Research shows potential benefits for body composition, recovery, and sleep quality.
products.short_description: Pulsatile GHRH analogue — pairs perfectly with Ipamorelin for synergistic GH release.

products.name: CJC-1295 With DAC 5mg
products.description: CJC-1295 With DAC features a Drug Affinity Complex that dramatically extends its half-life to 6-8 days via albumin binding. This allows for less frequent dosing while maintaining elevated GH levels. Research suggests it may provide sustained growth hormone stimulation, supporting body composition goals, recovery, and longevity-related pathways over extended periods.
products.short_description: Long-acting GHRH analogue — once or twice weekly dosing for sustained GH elevation.

products.name: Sermorelin 5mg
products.description: Sermorelin is a synthetic analogue of growth hormone-releasing hormone (GHRH), consisting of the first 29 amino acids of endogenous GHRH. As the most clinically studied GHRH analogue, sermorelin has been extensively researched for its ability to stimulate pituitary GH secretion. Research highlights potential benefits for anti-aging, body composition, bone density, and sleep quality.
products.short_description: Most clinically studied GHRH analogue — anti-aging and body composition research staple.

products.name: GHRP-2 5mg
products.description: GHRP-2 (Growth Hormone Releasing Peptide-2) is a synthetic hexapeptide that acts as a ghrelin receptor agonist, stimulating potent GH release from the pituitary. It is one of the most studied GH secretagogues, showing dose-dependent GH stimulation with research applications in muscle wasting conditions, growth deficiencies, and body composition optimization.
products.short_description: Potent GH secretagogue — dose-dependent growth hormone stimulation for research applications.

products.name: GHRP-6 5mg
products.description: GHRP-6 is one of the original growth hormone releasing peptides, acting on both ghrelin receptors and GHRH receptors to stimulate GH release. Notable for its strong appetite-stimulating effects alongside GH secretion, making it particularly interesting for research on muscle building and recovery protocols. One of the most cost-effective GH secretagogues available.
products.short_description: Classic GH releasing peptide — strong GH pulse with appetite stimulation research model.

products.name: Hexarelin 5mg
products.description: Hexarelin is among the most potent GH secretagogues, producing the largest GH pulse of any synthetic GHRP. Beyond its GH-releasing properties, hexarelin has been studied for direct cardioprotective effects through GH secretagogue receptor binding in cardiac tissue. Research applications include body composition, recovery, and cardiovascular health models.
products.short_description: Most potent GH secretagogue — largest GH pulse amplitude with cardioprotective research potential.

products.name: Epithalon 10mg
products.description: Epithalon (Epitalon) is a synthetic tetrapeptide (Ala-Glu-Asp-Gly) derived from the pineal gland peptide Epithalamin. It is one of the most extensively studied longevity peptides, with research spanning over 35 years by Russian scientist Dr. Vladimir Khavinson. Studies suggest epithalon activates telomerase, elongates telomeres, and may slow cellular aging processes — making it the premier anti-aging research peptide.
products.short_description: Premier longevity peptide — 35+ years of research on telomere extension and cellular anti-aging.

products.name: GHK-Cu 50mg
products.description: GHK-Cu (Copper Peptide GHK) is a naturally occurring tripeptide-copper complex found in human plasma. It has demonstrated remarkable properties in research including stimulation of collagen synthesis, wound healing, anti-inflammatory activity, and antioxidant effects. GHK-Cu activates over 4,000 genes including those involved in tissue remodeling, stem cell activity, and anti-aging pathways.
products.short_description: Copper-bound anti-aging tripeptide — activates 4,000+ genes for skin, hair, and tissue regeneration.

products.name: Thymosin Alpha-1 5mg
products.description: Thymosin Alpha-1 is a 28-amino acid peptide derived from Thymosin Fraction 5, first isolated from thymic tissue. It is a potent immune modulator with decades of clinical research across viral infections, cancer, and immunodeficiency conditions. TA-1 activates dendritic cells, T-cells, and NK cells while also exhibiting anti-inflammatory properties — making it one of the most well-studied immune peptides.
products.short_description: FDA-approved immune modulator — decades of clinical research on immune system optimization.

products.name: KPV 5mg
products.description: KPV is a tripeptide (Lys-Pro-Val) derived from the C-terminal sequence of alpha-MSH (α-Melanocyte-Stimulating Hormone). Research has shown KPV to be a potent anti-inflammatory peptide that works via inhibition of pro-inflammatory signaling pathways including NF-κB. Particularly studied for its applications in gut inflammation, skin conditions, and systemic inflammatory research models.
products.short_description: Potent anti-inflammatory tripeptide — derived from α-MSH for gut and systemic inflammation research.

products.name: Semax 5mg
products.description: Semax is a synthetic peptide analogue of the ACTH(4-7) fragment, developed in Russia for cognitive and neuroprotective applications. Research demonstrates significant BDNF (Brain-Derived Neurotrophic Factor) upregulation, enhanced attention, memory, and learning. Semax has been used clinically in Russia for stroke recovery and cognitive disorders, making it one of the most validated nootropic peptides.
products.short_description: Clinically used nootropic peptide — significantly boosts BDNF for memory, focus, and neuroprotection.

products.name: Selank 5mg
products.description: Selank is a synthetic heptapeptide analogue of the immunomodulatory peptide tuftsin, developed by the Institute of Molecular Genetics of the Russian Academy of Sciences. Research highlights its anxiolytic, nootropic, and immunomodulatory properties. Unlike benzodiazepines, Selank works through GABA-A receptor modulation without dependency risk, while also enhancing BDNF expression and neurotransmitter balance.
products.short_description: Anxiolytic nootropic peptide — reduces anxiety and enhances cognition without dependency risk.

products.name: Dihexa 25mg
products.description: Dihexa (N-hexanoic-Tyr-Ile-(6) aminohexanoic amide) is a novel hexapeptide derived from Angiotensin IV, developed at Washington State University. Research suggests it is several orders of magnitude more potent than BDNF itself at promoting synaptogenesis and hippocampal neurogenesis. Studies on Alzheimer's and cognitive decline models show exceptional promise for memory restoration and cognitive enhancement.
products.short_description: Next-generation cognitive peptide — millions of times more potent than BDNF for synaptogenesis.

products.name: SS-31 5mg
products.description: SS-31 (Elamipretide) is a Szeto-Schiller peptide that selectively targets the inner mitochondrial membrane, where it binds to cardiolipin. Research shows SS-31 dramatically reduces mitochondrial ROS production, protects against oxidative stress, and restores mitochondrial function. Studies demonstrate benefits for age-related mitochondrial decline, heart failure models, and various conditions involving mitochondrial dysfunction.
products.short_description: Mitochondria-targeted anti-aging peptide — restores mitochondrial function and reduces oxidative stress.

products.name: AOD-9604 5mg
products.description: AOD-9604 is a modified fragment of human growth hormone (hGH176-191) that has been specifically modified with a tyrosine component at the N-terminal end. Developed by Monash University, AOD-9604 has TGA approval in Australia and is extensively studied for its fat-burning properties without the negative effects associated with full HGH. Research shows it stimulates lipolysis and inhibits lipogenesis without affecting IGF-1 levels.
products.short_description: TGA-approved HGH fragment — targets fat burning without IGF-1 elevation or anabolic side effects.

products.name: PT-141 (Bremelanotide) 10mg
products.description: PT-141 (Bremelanotide) is a synthetic peptide analogue of alpha-MSH acting on melanocortin receptors (MC3R and MC4R) in the central nervous system. Unlike traditional sexual health compounds that target the cardiovascular system, PT-141 works centrally to enhance sexual arousal and desire. FDA-approved as Vyleesi for hypoactive sexual desire disorder in women, PT-141 is extensively studied in both male and female research models.
products.short_description: FDA-approved melanocortin receptor agonist — centrally-acting sexual health research compound.

products.name: Melanotan II 10mg
products.description: Melanotan II is a synthetic analogue of alpha-melanocyte-stimulating hormone (α-MSH), acting on melanocortin receptors 1, 3, 4, and 5. Research demonstrates tanning effects via melanogenesis stimulation, appetite suppression via MC4R activation, and sexual arousal effects. Developed at the University of Arizona, it remains one of the most studied multi-receptor melanocortin peptides.
products.short_description: Multi-receptor melanocortin peptide — tanning, appetite suppression, and libido research compound.
